profile.name: Aditya Pratap Singh Tomar
profile.title: Data Scientist | Software Engineer | MLOps Engineer
profile.headline: Building recruiter-ready software and ML systems with measurable outcomes.
profile.summary: Data Scientist and Software Engineer focused on production-ready ML products. I build end-to-end systems across data pipelines, deep learning, APIs, evaluation, and scalable deployment.

highlights: Designing core backend services and AI-driven workflow architecture in a zero-to-one startup.
Collaborating with founders to define scalable systems, automation pipelines, and product direction.
Leading high-impact deliverables across engineering and data teams.
Engineered AI-driven healthcare agents using LangGraph and LangChain, boosting startup growth by 15-20%.
Optimized backend workflows with FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, and Poetry, cutting API latency by 20%.
Built an AI-powered interview platform MVP with GPT-3.5 question generation (~80% relevance).
Implemented multi-modal sentiment analysis on 100+ interview transcripts and real-time video (~75% accuracy).

skills.name: ML System Engineering
skills.summary: Designing end-to-end ML systems from data prep to production inference.

skills.name: Data Science & Forecasting
skills.summary: Turning noisy datasets into models, metrics, and decision-ready insights.

skills.name: Deep Learning & Signal Modeling
skills.summary: Building transformer-based models for sequence and biomedical signal tasks.

skills.name: Computer Vision
skills.summary: Developing detection pipelines for real-world visual automation workflows.

skills.name: MLOps & Deployment
skills.summary: Operationalizing training, evaluation, and deployment for reliable ML delivery.

skills.name: LLM Apps & Workflow Automation
skills.summary: Building production-ready AI features with grounded prompts, orchestration, and fallback paths.

skills.name: Software Engineering & APIs
skills.summary: Shipping backend services and product-focused applications with clean interfaces.

achievements.title: SIH'25 Finalist
achievements.detail: Smart India Hackathon 2025 - Problem Statement PS-25189.

achievements.title: 350+ DSA Problems
achievements.detail: Solved across platforms and earned the GFG160 badge.

leadership.description: Led the Winter-Arc month-long event, mentoring a 50+ member student team to build the platform, run campaigns, secure sponsorships, and drive 400+ participants through an AI-powered learning ecosystem.
Delivered a technical seminar for 100+ students on Data Structures & Algorithms (DSA) and mentored junior developers.

services.title: Machine Learning Development
services.description: End-to-end ML model development from data preprocessing to deployment. Specializing in deep learning, Transformers, and time-series analysis with production-grade code.

services.title: Data Analysis & Visualization
services.description: Comprehensive data analysis pipelines using Python, Pandas, and advanced visualization tools. Transform raw data into actionable insights.

services.title: MLOps & Deployment
services.description: Production-ready ML infrastructure with MLflow, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines. Automated retraining and drift detection.

services.title: AI-Powered Applications
services.description: Building intelligent applications with LangChain, LangGraph, and LLMs. From AI agents to RAG systems.

services.title: Technical Mentorship
services.description: Guidance for students and developers in DSA, machine learning, and AI fundamentals.

services.title: Full-Stack ML Solutions
services.description: Complete ML solutions from frontend to backend using FastAPI, Flask, and modern frameworks.
